response.justification: Despite a long and diverse career, the candidate shows minimal evidence of hands-on C++ development in the last 20+ years, with only a brief early-career role at National Instruments involving LabWindows/CVI — not modern C++/STL or industrial automation systems. The resume is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies, with no mention of message brokers, MQTT, IEC 62443, multi-threaded C++ systems, or industrial IoT protocols — all core requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and create educational content
concerns: Lack of recent or substantial C++/STL experience for industrial high-performance systems
No demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
Primary tech stack is web-focused (JS/TS/DLang), not aligned with on-prem/cloud automation platforms
